data.title: Broe Group adds John Hayes and Alex Darden to board, founded in 1972 by Pat Broe, a multibillion-dollar investment company.
data.description: In Denver on December 11, 2025, The Broe Group, a well-established investment firm with a total worth of billions of dollars founded in 1972 by Pat Broe, announced the appointment of John Hayes and Alex Darden as growth and operations leaders to The Broe Family Board. This governing board, responsible for coordinating synergies and strategies, will now benefit from the expertise and leadership of these two new additions.

data.title: Quality HVAC company in Tulsa advises homeowners to ready homes for winter to ensure safety, comfort.
data.description: In preparation for the upcoming winter season, Tulsa's Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric experts are offering valuable maintenance advice to ensure families remain safe, comfortable, and stress-free. Based in Glenpool, this reputable company specializes in HVAC, plumbing, and electric services. These tips aim to assist households in maintaining their systems effectively throughout the colder months. Staying proactive with maintenance can potentially save homeowners hundreds of dollars in repair costs and ensure their homes are properly insulated against the frigid weather. With their expertise in the field, the team at Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric is encouraging residents to take preventive measures now to avoid any unforeseen issues. By implementing these recommendations, families can enjoy a cozy and worry-free winter season.

data.title: Altria Group CEO Billy Gifford retires; Sal Mancuso appointed successor in Richmond, VA. #Altria #CEOretirement
data.description: Richmond, Virginia-based Altria Group Inc. has disclosed the retirement of CEO Billy Gifford. Sal Mancuso has been appointed as the successor to Gifford. The transition in leadership comes as the company aims to steer its trajectory in the tobacco industry. Gifford's departure marks a significant change for the company with an annual revenue of approximately $25 billion. Mancuso's appointment as CEO is anticipated to bring new strategies and insights to Altria, a leading player in the global market. This decision reflects the company's commitment to adapt to evolving market dynamics and drive growth in the future.

data.title: H. Yturria Ranch launches luxury brand, ShopHYTurria.com offers Texas-made apparel & decor inspired by 167 years of heritage.
data.description: In Houston, the historic H. Yturria Ranch has launched H. Yturria Ranch Mercantile, a luxury brand showcasing Texas heritage from its 167 years of existence. The brand's collection includes locally made clothing, handcrafted ranch items, and elegant home decor reflective of the ranch's sprawling 14,000 acres in Raymondville. The products are now on sale at ShopHYTurria.com and in stores starting this Saturday.

data.title: PowerBank launches first satellite on Dec 10, 2025 for "Orbital Cloud" project with Smartlink AI, targeting 5–8 orbital nodes.  #30chars
data.description: On December 10, 2025, a rocket was successfully launched. A significant upcoming goal is the expansion to 5-8 orbital nodes that will combine computing and connectivity. The company behind this initiative, PowerBank Corporation, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SUUN, on Cboe CA as SUNN, and on FSE as 103. This development was reported in Toronto on December 11, 2025.

data.title: Odyssey Functional Energy is expanding to over 90 U.S. airports through a deal with CIBO Express.
data.description: Odyssey Functional Energy has expanded its presence to over 90 airport locations, offering sustained energy, cognitive enhancement, and mood-boosting benefits along with fantastic taste. The company, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, confirmed this positive development on December 11, 2025. Odyssey Functional Energy is a prominent player in the functional beverage and energy drink industry, catering to a wide consumer base seeking specialized drinks for their health and wellness needs.

data.title: Bitcoin remains stable at $90,000 despite Fed rate cut. Liquidations at $497.83 million, Bitcoin ETFs with $223.5 million inflows. Ethereum ETFs saw $57.6 million net inflows, posing short-term uptrend challenges. Key levels to watch: $89,500 & $91,800 for momentum shifts.
data.description: Following the Federal Reserve's 25-basis-point rate cut, Bitcoin remains stable around $90,000, experiencing liquidations totaling $497.83 million within 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs attracted $223.5 million in net inflows, while Ethereum ETFs received $57.6 million on Wednesday. Analyst Michael van de Poppe suggested caution as Bitcoin struggled to surpass the crucial $91,800 mark post FOMC, leading to a market-wide decline. Despite this, the overall trend shows higher lows, maintaining a short-term uptrend. Key levels to monitor include $89,500, a break below which may lead to a double-bottom at $80,000, and $91,800, reclaiming which could reignite bullish momentum while another rejection could heighten downside risks. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: AeroVironment wins $4.8M contract to supply ROVs for U.S. Coast Guard modernization plan; using Defender ROVs for enhanced maritime response capabilities.
data.description: A company specializing in underwater robotic systems, AeroVironment, Inc. (“AV”), recently disclosed that it secured a significant contract with the United States Coast Guard valued at $4.8 million. This contract was awarded to AV's subsidiary, VideoRay, to provide Mission Specialist Defender remotely operated vehicles (ROVs). The procurement of these ROVs is part of the Coast Guard’s Force Design 2028 modernization program aimed at bolstering their maritime response operations. The inclusion of Defender ROVs will significantly enhance the Coast Guard's ability to swiftly respond to situations underwater.

data.title: Intruder launches new secrets detection checks for API keys, finds thousands of exposed tokens in 5 million apps.
data.description: Intruder, a prominent player in exposure management, unveiled a fresh set of top-notch secrets detection scans for identifying sensitive API keys and tokens concealed within JavaScript bundles employed in single-page applications. The introduction of these enhanced scans was prompted by the detection of a significant group of leaked secret vulnerabilities that circumvent regular security protocols. Leveraging a novel spidering-based secrets detection approach, Intruder conducted scans on around 5 million applications.

data.title: Global payments leaders face disruption in 2026, lacking roadmap per ACI Worldwide report, predicting AI-driven changes in the industry.
data.description: A recent report by ACI Worldwide found that many global payments leaders are unprepared for the significant changes expected in the payment industry by 2026. The report, titled Top Ten Payments Predictions, highlighted key trends such as AI-driven intelligence, next-gen authentication, evolving regulatory frameworks, and a growing demand for instant, embedded, and secure payments. The study, conducted by ACI Worldwide - a pioneer in global payments technology listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ACIW, suggests that the industry is on the verge of facing a period of structural disruption. The report does not provide specific numbers but emphasizes the importance of industry players developing a clear roadmap to navigate these upcoming changes effectively.

data.title: TeleMate releases enhanced UC&C observability with WebRTC monitoring and faster data navigation for troubleshooting.
data.description: In Atlanta, TeleMate has bolstered its UC&C observability by introducing new features. These include WebRTC monitoring, improved Pexip support, and streamlined MELT data navigation to expedite issue resolution. These upgrades aim to enhance the monitoring capabilities of the platform and provide faster troubleshooting.

data.title: CEO Warrior's Xcelerator program in Eatontown, NJ helps contractors achieve sustainable growth by equipping them with strategies to dominate their market.
data.description: In Eatontown, New Jersey, on December 11, 2025, service business owners can undergo an immersive training program that provides them with the essential clarity, systems, and strategies to efficiently expand their business operations. CEO Warrior, a prominent entity specializing in business training, coaching, and implementation, offers this comprehensive program. The training is designed to equip owners with the tools needed to scale their businesses sustainably and establish a dominant presence in their respective markets. This hands-on experience aims to empower entrepreneurs with the necessary skills to navigate and excel in the competitive business landscape.

data.title: Benzinga partners with Perplexity for AI-driven financial research, enhancing market data delivery. #partnership #AI
data.description: In Detroit on December 11, 2025, a major financial news and data provider in North America, Benzinga, revealed a significant partnership with Perplexity, a rapidly expanding AI answer engine. This collaboration aims to combine Benzinga's influential market data with Perplexity's advanced technology. No specific details about the partnership were provided, but the move is likely to enhance the capabilities of both companies in delivering comprehensive financial insights.

data.title: Doosan Bobcat to showcase AI tech at CES 2026, taking it from cloud to jobsite. Leading equipment manufacturer innovating.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in West Fargo, North Dakota, Doosan Bobcat, a prominent global equipment manufacturer under the Doosan Group, announced their plan to introduce innovative technologies at CES 2026. These advancements aim to integrate artificial intelligence more directly into job site operations instead of relying solely on cloud-based systems. This move is expected to enhance efficiency and productivity on job sites.

data.title: MedSpeed appoints Dhiraj Patkar as Chief Product and Technology Officer, bringing 20+ years of healthcare innovation experience.
data.description: A highly experienced leader with over two decades of expertise in health care innovation has joined the same-day logistics provider in Elmhurst, Illinois. On December 11, 2025, MedSpeed, a prominent company offering same-day logistics solutions to the health care sector, revealed the selection of Dhiraj Patkar to their team.

data.title: 30% of genesis PEPE supply bundled by one entity, $2 million in tokens sold post-launch, Bubblemaps alleges.
data.description: Approximately one-third of the total genesis PEPE supply was consolidated by a single entity, which proceeded to sell tokens valued at $2 million just one day after the launch, as reported by Bubblemaps.
